visualGoal: Convince a would-be sailing simmer that the smart 2026 setup is software + a second monitor, not a wheel — with the one genuinely transformative hardware purchase (Quest 3 / MarineVerse) shown as real product proof. Honest niche guide; no fabricated hardware imagery.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic evening desk sailing-sim setup: a main monitor showing an open-water yacht view at dusk, a second monitor beside it showing a nautical chart and tide table, a plain gamepad resting on the desk, curator Gus Calder relaxed in the chair studying the chart screen, deep teal ocean palette, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake sim UI text, warped hardware, giant unreadable overlays, procedural gradient art, a prominent steering wheel (the guide argues AGAINST one)
